message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Sqrt primitive

Add 19 oracle tests for Sqrt primitive covering:
- Perfect squares (0, 1, 4, 9, 16, 100)
- Irrational values (sqrt(2), sqrt(3))
- Special values (infinity, NaN, negative)
- Mathematical properties: squared identity, multiplicativity
- Non-negativity and monotonicity
- Fractional and very small values
- 1D/2D tensor shapes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
